title: Mlikero 10 Pack Classic Baseplates Building Plates- Large 10" x 10" Building Bricks, Compatible with All Major Brands and Activity Table, for Builders Age 3+ (Grey)
features: 【SIZE&APPLICATION】Measuring 10" (25cm) x 10" (25cm), Pack of 10 Classic building plates. Classic Baseplates are designed to work seamlessly with all major brick brands, so you can easily combine them with your existing sets and creations.

【EXCLUSIVE DESIGN】Classic Baseplates come in a wide range of colors, giving builders the flexibility to create all kinds of different models. Classic Baseplates provide a perfect starting point for your imagination, whether you're building a sprawling cityscape, a towering skyscraper, or a tiny house.

【STABLE FOUNDATION】Reinforced Classic Baseplates provide a strong and stable foundation for your building creations, making it easier for you to build bigger, better, and more complex models. With these Classic Baseplates, you can build with confidence knowing that your structure will stay together and not fall apart.

【LIMITIESS CREATIVITY】Classic Baseplates provide an endless canvas for builders to explore their creativity and build anything they can think of. Whether you build alone or with a friend,These ClassicBaseplates offer endless fun and creativity

【AFTER SELL SERVICE】Excellent service: We are committed to providing excellent after-sales service to our customers, and we stand behind our products with a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you have any issues or concerns with your purchase, we are always here to help！
description: Product Description The classic baseplate is your best choice to create endless possibilities! We offer a wide range of colors of baseplates to meet your different needs. Design your own play wall/table! ATTENTION: NO GLUE ON THE BACK OF BASEPLATES. Great choice for spending family time with your children！ Does these baseplates work with the major brand? Sure. Our baseplates are designed for major brands. In addition to mainstream brands, the building blocks of classic series of other brands are also suitable. Does the baseplate work with the Minifigures? Sure. In addition to being used to support buildings, the baseplates can also be used to display minifigures. Note: Nano bricks are not applicable. What is the baseplates made of? The Baseplates is made of safe ABS plastic. Non-toxic and odorless.
